name: Vegetarian Barley-Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups frozen green beans or peas
recipeInstructions:
Cut the frozen green beans or peas into pieces to make 2 cups.
1. Heat butter or margarine in a large kettle over medium heat.
2. Add onions, carrots, and celery. Cook, stirring occasionally for about 5 minutes until softened.
3. Add tomatoes, water, basil, thyme, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
5. Stir in barley and continue cooking, uncovered, for 1 1/2 hours or until barley is tender.
6. Stir in green beans or peas during last 10 minutes of cooking.
7. Remove from heat and stir in dill.
8. Serves 10-12 people. Great for a casual lunch or supper.
